name: jacobstreams.com
description: The official bio website for JacobStreams. It features all his socials, events, and more.

name: I SEE YOU
description: A game made in ~22 hours by me and three other people for the D&A Game Jam that won Most Promising Game award!

name: kadenissilly.com
description: My very own bio website featuring my socials.

name: M-Day
description: A mod for CoD: Advanced Warfare's Exo Zombies game mode that replaces all the special zombies with normal zombies.

name: kaden-the.dev
description: My own portfolio website that lists all my projects, tells you a bit about me, and how to reach me.

name: archivesmp.net
description: The official website for the ArchiveSMP Minecraft server. It lists all the members and their main social media link.

name: Keep the Viewers Up!
description: A game where you need to keep your viewers by doing various tasks. Made in ~28 hours for the JacobStreams' Talent Show.

name: Minirooms
description: A very short Backrooms game I made in 2023 to teach myself the basics of Unreal Engine.
